name: Red Bull Racing
description: Red Bull Racing is an Austrian Formula 1 racing team owned by Red Bull GmbH. Founded in 2005, they have become one of the most successful teams in F1 history with 6 Constructors' Championships and numerous Drivers' Championships with Max Verstappen.

name: Ferrari
description: Scuderia Ferrari is the oldest and most iconic team in Formula 1, founded in 1929. Known as 'The Prancing Horse', Ferrari has won 16 Constructors' Championships and is the most successful team in F1 history.

name: Mercedes
description: Mercedes-AMG Petronas F1 Team is a German Formula 1 racing team based in Brackley, United Kingdom. They have dominated F1 since 2014, winning 8 consecutive Constructors' Championships and revolutionizing the sport with hybrid technology.

name: McLaren
description: McLaren Racing is a British Formula 1 team founded in 1963. One of the most successful teams in F1 history with 8 Constructors' Championships, McLaren has been at the forefront of technological innovation and driver development.

name: Aston Martin
fullName: Aston Martin Aramco Cognizant F1 Team
description: Aston Martin Aramco Cognizant F1 Team is a British Formula 1 team that returned to F1 in 2021 after a long absence. Owned by Lawrence Stroll, the team combines British luxury brand heritage with modern racing technology.

name: Alpine
description: BWT Alpine F1 Team is a French Formula 1 team that evolved from Renault F1 Team. Founded in 2021, Alpine represents the sports division of Groupe Renault and brings French engineering excellence to the grid.

name: Haas
description: MoneyGram Haas F1 Team is an American Formula 1 team founded in 2016 by Gene Haas. As the first American-owned F1 team in decades, Haas brings NASCAR manufacturing expertise and American business philosophy to Formula 1.

name: Williams
description: Williams Racing is a British Formula 1 team founded in 1977. One of the most successful teams in F1 history with 9 Constructors' Championships, Williams pioneered many technological innovations and launched the careers of legendary drivers.

name: Audi
description: Audi F1 Team is a German Formula 1 team that entered F1 in 2026. As part of Volkswagen Group, Audi brings its motorsport heritage and cutting-edge technology to compete at the highest level of motorsport.

name: Racing Bulls
fullName: Visa Cash App Racing Bulls F1 Team
description: Visa Cash App Racing Bulls F1 Team is an Italian Formula 1 team that rebranded from AlphaTauri in 2024. With deep Italian motorsport roots, Racing Bulls focuses on developing young talent while competing competitively.

name: Cadillac
description: Cadillac Racing is an American Formula 1 team that entered F1 in 2025. As General Motors' luxury brand, Cadillac brings American automotive prestige and V-Series performance heritage to the Formula 1 grid.
